name: Main menu - gamepad focus + nav
description: PIE boots into HubWorld's main menu (WBP_MenuLayer stack). First gamepad input flips CommonInput to Gamepad, which applies the menu's DesiredFocusWidget (Button_Play) and then navigates - so one Down deterministically lands on Button_Options. Nav Up returns to Button_Play. Buttons assert via focusPathContains because a CommonButton's focused leaf is an unnamed internal SCommonButton. No Accept pressed here (Button_Quit risk); the click path is covered by options_roundtrip.json. Requires CommonUI.ShouldVirtualAcceptSimulateMouseButton=0 (DefaultEngine.ini) for the broader pad story, though this spec itself only navigates.

steps.note: flip applies desired focus (Button_Play), same Down then navigates to Button_Options
